statement: In every magma, Equation 1576 (`x = (y * z) * (y * (y * w))`) implies Equation 1298 (`x = y * (((x * z) * x) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0929
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op y (op y w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x z) x) w))
